title: Attaching maps / face poset of the witness complex F_w

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
**Gap C.** Using Gap A and the cell census of Gap B, determine and verify the full incidence structure of $F_w$ for $w=aa^{-1}bb^{-1}aa^{-1}cc^{-1}aa^{-1}$:
- for each of the 6 one-cells, identify the two 0-cells at its endpoints (the two resolutions of its single crossing);
- for each of the 3 two-cells (squares), identify the four 1-cells bounding it (the four facets of the cube $I_{c_1}\times I_{c_2}$).

Each incidence must be re-checked against the resolution rule and the coherence condition. The output is the face poset realizing the 'menorah' gluing of Figure 1. This is the data needed before any topological identification (Gap D) can be carried out rigorously.
